input.title: Eddie / James - Weekly DS Standup
input.markdownContent:
### Updates

- Enricher v17 shipped last week — accuracy at 100% on gold set
- Gate prompt at v7, F1 at 87% — looking at ceiling on remaining false negatives
- Thread capture deployed and running on Heroku
- Jira slices DS-73 through DS-80 scoped and ready to start

### Blockers

- Granola MCP auth still pending
- Waiting on Notion schema review before DS-77 can start

### This Week

- Start DS-73 Granola ingestion
- DS-76 taxonomy confirmation

expectedOutput.skipReason: All participants are Spotted Zebra employees and content is internal process/status — no customer-reported feedback present
